crossCheckExpectations.producer: Calypso Sands Distilling, Inc., Miami, FL

intentionalMismatches.expectedFromApplication: Calypso Sands Distilling, Inc., Miami, FL
intentionalMismatches.appearsOnLabelAs: Bottled by Tropical Spirits LLC, San Juan, PR
intentionalMismatches.rationale: Producer/bottler statement on the label names a different entity than the applicant on the form. Cross-check failure. (Plausible real-world cause: contract bottling without updating the COLA filer.)
TTB requires % alcohol by volume; proof alone is not sufficient for distilled spirits. Should surface as a label-only ABV rule failure.

notes: Combined failure: cross-check (producer) and label-only rule (ABV format). Exercises both pipelines firing simultaneously and the result card aggregating both.
